author: Akhil Meesala
text: Everyone wants to build AI agents. But before agents, RAG, MCP, or fine-tuning, master the fundamentals of LLMs. Understand: ✅ Tokens & context windows ✅ Prompt engineering ✅ Embeddings & vector search ✅ Hallucinations & guardrails ✅ Temperature, top-p, and sampling ✅ Evaluation & observability Strong AI engineers are built on strong fundamentals. Learn the basics first. Everything else becomes easier. Follow me Akhil Meesala for more about AI Agents. #LLM #GenerativeAI #AIEngineering #MachineLearning #ArtificialIntelligence

author: SQL Mastery for Tech Interviews: Essential Questions and Tips
text:
SQL Mastery for Tech Interviews

Whether you're targeting Software Engineering, Data Analysis, or Backend Development roles — SQL is non-negotiable in interviews.

Most companies assess SQL skills, so solid preparation is crucial.

To help you out, I’ve created a PDF guide packed with the most frequently asked SQL interview questions, including:

Basic to Advanced SQL Queries

Joins, Subqueries & Indexing

Normalization vs. Denormalization

ACID Properties & Transactions

Stored Procedures, Triggers & more

Looking for an ATS-friendly resume? Grab the template here: https://lnkd.in/gx64i6vE

Let’s simplify SQL — and crack that interview with confidence!

author: Kriti Jaiswal
text: What if we’re scaling the wrong thing entirely? Every few months, AI gets faster, bigger, and more impressive. And every time, the predictions get bigger too: AGI is near. Jobs will disappear. Intelligence is just more compute away. I’ve been following AI for a while, and this conversation with Gary Marcus felt different. Because instead of asking: “What can AI do?” It asks: “What can AI still not do?” The discussion covers AI hype, AGI timelines, why current systems still fail in unexpected ways, and whether bigger models automatically lead to smarter systems. Not an anti-AI take. Just a conversation that challenges the assumptions almost everyone repeats. 🎙️ Watch here: https://lnkd.in/gc5-mPe6 After watching, I’m curious: What’s one AI prediction you think people are too confident about? Mukesh Bansal #AI #ArtificialIntelligence #AGI #MachineLearning #FutureOfAI
